title: Quality and Effectiveness of Social Work: Peer Reflection Discussions of Research Social Workers 2024-2025
description: The data consists of three transcripts of peer reflection discussions. It was collected as part of the SULAVA project's practice research section, as part of a year-long social work career model trial (2024-2025), which was implemented in the Inland Finland collaborative area in services for families with children, working-age adults, and older people. The interviewees were three social workers from the Inland Finland collaborative area who had applied for and been selected for the career model
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
